prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约12498→11105→14310→10972→12436名，整体呈波动走势，2025年基准位次约12436名。近5年位次在10972–14310之间震荡，无明显单边趋势；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年32人、2022年32人、2023年30人、2024年25人、2025年27人；2026年计划大幅扩招至56人，较2025年增加约107%，扩招幅度显著，将明显拉低录取门槛，位次数字预计大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第101名，近年排名在90–104之间波动，整体处于中游211水平；2023年曾出现师德师风相关偏负面舆情（运动会着装争议），但影响范围有限；抖音综合热度排名第84，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于211院校中下游水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类相关专业社会热度持续高热推荐，对考生吸引力强；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约267900人，按近年物理类占比约76%估算，物理类考生约203604人，较2025年192096人增加约11508人（+6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，在福建省属跨省招生，无本地生源倾斜；近年福建省物理类考生持续增长，跨省报考竞争压力上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划大幅扩招107%这一最关键因素，位次将显著后移；同时福建省物理类考生增加约6%部分抵消扩招效应，但扩招幅度远超考生增幅。，结合考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧，小幅修正后预测最低位次约20251名，区间19751–20751名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 12498 → 11105 → 14310 → 10972 → 12436, showing a fluctuating trend, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 12436. Over the past 5 years, rankings oscillated between 10972 and 14310, with no clear unilateral trend; the university's enrollment plan in Fujian Province for Physics Category was 32 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 27 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 56 students, an increase of about 107% compared to 2025, a substantial expansion that will notably lower the admission threshold, with ranking numbers expected to shift significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 101st, with rankings fluctuating between 90 and 104 in recent years, overall at a mid-tier 211 level; in 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics and style (sports attire controversy), but its impact was limited; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a lower-middle level among 211 universities, showing no clear signal of increased application interest.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors related to Physics Category such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting candidates; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 267,900, with Physics Category accounting for about 76% in recent years, estimating about 203,604 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 11,508 (+6%) compared to 192,096 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, and recruits across provinces in Fujian, with no local student preference; in recent years, the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian has been continuously increasing, raising competition pressure for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the most critical factor of a 107% expansion in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, rankings will significantly shift backward; meanwhile, the 6% increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates partially offsets the expansion effect, but the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate. Combined with intensified competition due to the expanded candidate pool, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20,251, with a range of 19,751–20,751.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category sees significant expansion, with rankings expected to shift backward to approximately 20,251, range 19,751–20,751. It is recommended that candidates within this range primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Communication) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Bioengineering, Surveying, Materials, etc.) as safety choices. Popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence will still face intense competition; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the predicted range are advised to focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第101名，近年排名在90–104之间波动，整体处于中游211水平；2023年曾出现师德师风相关偏负面舆情（运动会着装争议），但影响范围有限；抖音综合热度排名第84，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于211院校中下游水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类相关专业中，法学社会热度推荐、汉语言/中文推荐、新闻传播明显劝退；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约267900人，按近年历史类占比约24%估算，历史类考生约63970人，较2025年60252人增加约3718人（+6.2%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，在福建省属跨省招生，无本地生源倾斜；近年福建省历史类考生先降后升，跨省报考竞争压力上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类招生计划小幅扩招4.2%、福建省历史类考生增加约6.2%以及历年位次后移趋势，供需弹性计算基准位次约3005名。考生增幅略大于计划增幅，竞争小幅加剧，修正后预测最低位次约3035名，区间2535–3535名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2385 → 2505 → 2701 → 3270 → 2932, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 547 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2932; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 17 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 24 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 25, a slight expansion of 1 student (+4.2%) compared to 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 101st in 2026, fluctuating between 90–104 in recent years, overall at a mid-tier 211 level; in 2023, there was a negative public opinion related to teacher ethics (sports attire controversy), but the impact was limited; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a lower-middle level among 211 universities, showing no significant signal of increased application interest.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category related majors, Law has high social recommendation, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province general college entrance examination is about 267,900, with History Category accounting for approximately 24% in recent years, estimating about 63,970 History Category candidates, an increase of about 3,718 (+6.2%) from 60,252 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, and recruits across provinces in Fujian, with no local student preference; in recent years, the number of History Category candidates in Fujian first decreased then increased, raising cross-provincial application competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2026 History Category enrollment plan's slight expansion of 4.2%, the increase of about 6.2% in Fujian History Category candidates, and the historical ranking backward trend, the supply-demand elasticity calculates a baseline ranking of about 3005. The candidate growth slightly exceeds the plan growth, competition slightly intensifies, and the corrected predicted minimum ranking is about 3035, with a range of 2535–3535.
